===================
=== Bob Dylan The Belafonte Sessions.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan

The Belafonte Sessions

Here's a bit of Bob Dylan history:

All 20 takes for "The Midnight Special" with Bob Dylan on harmonica
as recorded at the Webster Hall, New York City, NY, USA, on Februari 2, 1962.
Sessions produced by Hugo Montenegro for Harry Belafonte's "The Midnight Special" album.

20 Tracks

Harry Belafonte vocal
Ernie Calabria guitar
Millard Thomas guitar
Bob Dylan harmonica
Norman Keenen bass
Percy Bruce drums
Don Lamond drums
Danny Barrajanos drums

A litte bit over 30 minutes - Bob couldn't stand anymore...

Master tape copy > CDR > EAC secure > FLAC 8 > TorrentSpy > you
Cover art included.

Enjoy!

. . . m a r a s t h a . . .
